name: Mason Reed

background.key_experience: Got permanently locked out of his Amazon account after their AI fraud detection system flagged his legitimate purchase of a $200 power tool as suspicious - customer service refused to explain the algorithm's reasoning or override it, forcing him to create a new account and lose all his purchase history and reviews.

cognition.core_value: Transparency in automated systems - if a machine makes a decision affecting people's lives, the reasoning must be explainable in plain human terms
cognition.bias: Automation bias - assumes algorithmic decisions are inherently flawed when they lack transparency, but over-trusts transparent systems even when they're wrong

current_state.recent_memory: Yesterday, his delivery route optimization software added 45 minutes to his day because it couldn't account for a parade rerouting traffic - the dispatcher said 'the algorithm knows best' when he complained

online_voice: Blunt, uses delivery/logistics metaphors, cites specific technical failures, dismisses emotional appeals as 'irrelevant data'
